summary: The stock has mixed technical signals, with both bullish and bearish factors present, but the bullish factors have a slight edge due to the positive momentum and moving averages.
bullish_factors: The 20-day moving average is above the 50-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
The stock has positive 20-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: Price is below the 20-day moving average.
MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
